title: elaphoglossum favigerum
intro: Elaphoglossum favigerum is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum favigerum include its ability to help alleviate symptoms of coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function. In herbal preparations, Elaphoglossum favigerum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
